title: Masco (MAS) Stock Jumps 6.5%: Will It Continue to Soar?
text: Masco (MAS) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: Behr Paint Company Announces 2023 Color of the Year "Blank Canvas," A Transformative Hue to Clear the Way for Endless Design Possibilities and an Opportunity for Self-Care
text: New Study Conducted by Behr Paint Shows Three-Quarters of Homeowners Believe That the Color White Promotes Relaxation and Creates A Sense of Calm SANTA ANA, Calif. , Sept. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Behr Paint Company , announces its 2023 Color of the Year, Blank Canvas (DC-003), a hopeful and welcoming warm white that offers limitless design and décor possibilities.

title: KILZ® & BEHR PRO® OFFER PROFESSIONAL PAINTERS AN OPPORTUNITY TO WIN A CUSTOM VAN STOCKED WITH ALL THE TOOLS FOR ANY JOB
text: The trusted primer and paint brands partner with MotorTrend® Group to give away a combined value of $115,000 in professional materials to one lucky winner of the KILZ® Ultimate Pro Van Contest SANTA ANA, Calif. , Sept. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KILZ® & BEHR PRO® are teaming up to bring back their KILZ® Ultimate Pro Van Contest in partnership with MotorTrend® Group.

title: 4 Dividend-Paying Construction Stocks for a Stable Portfolio
text: No matter how volatile the global markets are, these construction companies ensure stable payouts.

title: Masco's (MAS) Long-Term Views Look Good, Soft Demand Ails
text: Masco (MAS) poses strength on leading brands and cost synergies. Yet, slow demand and inflationary woes to hurt in the near term.

title: Is Masco Corporation (MAS) a Great Stock for Value Investors?
